basic_details.job_title: IGRUA Simulator Engineer-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Candidates up to 55 years of age who have B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc. in Computer Science/IT/Software Engineering/Electronics & Communication Engineering with a minimum of 8 years post-qualification experience are eligible to apply for these Simulator Engineer-I vacancies. The application process for IGRUA Simulator Engineer-I Recruitment 2026 is being conducted via email and will remain open until 15 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years as on 01-05-2026. No age relaxation details are provided in the extracted data.

qualification.details: Simulator Engineer-I: B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc. in Computer Science/IT/Software Engineering/Electronics & Comm. Engg. from a reputed institute. Minimum 8 years post-qualification experience in software development, maintenance & support.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IGRUA Simulator Engineer-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Simulator Engineer-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech/B.Sc. in Computer Science/IT/Software Engineering/Electronics & Comm. Engg. from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. How many years of experience are needed for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 8 years of post-qualification experience in software development, maintenance, and support is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Simulator Engineer-I role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 55 years as of 1st May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the provided data.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Simulator Engineer-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the Simulator Engineer-I post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job at IGRUA?
faq.answer: The job is offered on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi located?
faq.answer: The academy is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with a pincode of 229302.

faq.question: Q10. How should I submit my application?
faq.answer: Applications should be submitted via email, along with all required documents, to the official email address specified in the notification.
